name: Anise Cookies " Anesplatzchen
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs until fluffy in a mixer bowl at medium speed.
2. Gradually beat in sugar and continue beating for an additional 20 minutes (this is crucial).
3. Mix flour, baking powder, and salt at low speed.
4. Add anise extract and beat only to blend.
5. Drop dough by teaspoonful onto greased and floured baking sheets about 1/2 inch apart.
6. Swirl each cookie to form a circular shape.
7. Bake at 325°F (160°C) for about 10 minutes, or until firm-looking and set.
If allowed to stand on the baking sheets for 8 hours at room temperature, these cookies will become a coffee dunker variety. If baked immediately, they remain soft and delicate. Either way, they are delicious. I bake mine the second way.
